title: Reef Redux
description: Changing up how coral reefs generate!
body:
![Reef redux cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cXc3rmTO/images/60e836479ce247f96ac65c0f44fd16a82ce3d132.png)

Reef Redux
---
This small mod changes how coral reefs generate in Minecraft. Instead of the flat stretches with coral formations coming right out of the seabed, this mod adds coral that generates on rocky outcrops. These outcrops sometimes contain caves and can have other unique generation, such as arches. 

Note that as of 1.1.0, vanilla coral reef generation is replaced entirely!

See the gallery for more images!
